_observed: Bulk-lot listing pattern — a 200-card collection sold as one listing, priced under $50 because each card is worth pennies. The search-by-keyword surface still matches because 'Charizard' appears in the title (claiming to contain one). Title-quality filter (Stage 2) catches this on the 'lot' AND 'collection' AND multi-'Pokemon' mention keywords. The buyer would click through expecting a Charizard deal and find a bag of commons.
title: Pokemon Card Collection LOT 200 Cards Holo Rare Charizard Pokemon Pokemon TCG Mixed
